Interface Renderer<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type this renderer can draw
All Known Implementing Classes:
Renderer.ForRenderable, Renderer.ForRenderable2D, Renderer.ForRenderable2DWithHitbox
public interface Renderer<T>
A renderer is an object that can render a specific type of objects. The objects don't have to implement Renderable. This interface allows for dynamic rendering implementations.
See Also:
  • Renderer.ForRenderable
  • Renderer.ForRenderable2D
  • Renderer.ForRenderable2DWithHitbox
  • Renderable

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    Renderer.ForRenderable<T extends Renderable>
    A simple implementation of Renderer which draws Renderable objects.
    static class 
    Renderer.ForRenderable2D<T extends Renderable2D>
    An implementation of Renderer which draws Renderable2D objects, applying respective transformations.
    static class 
    Renderer.ForRenderable2DWithHitbox<T extends Renderable2D>
    An implementation of Renderer which draws a Renderable2D and its hitbox on top.

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    Hitbox2D
    getBounds(T obj, RenderingContext ctx)
    Returns the boundaries of the given object on a 2D surface.
    boolean
    isVisible(T obj)
    Checks if the given object is visible.
    void
    render(T obj, RenderCanvas canvas)
    Render the given object onto the given canvas.

  • Method Details

    • render

      void render(T obj, RenderCanvas canvas)
      Render the given object onto the given canvas.
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to render
      canvas - the canvas

    • isVisible

      boolean isVisible(T obj)
      Checks if the given object is visible. This method is used as a hint for skipping rendering of the object.
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to check
      Returns:
      whether the object should be rendered

    • getBounds

      Hitbox2D getBounds(T obj, RenderingContext ctx)
      Returns the boundaries of the given object on a 2D surface.
      Parameters:
      obj - the object
      ctx - the rendering context
      Returns:
      the object's 2D bounds
      See Also:
      • RenderingSurface
